product_overview: A minimal single-page panel that reads window.ELIZA_CONFIG.agentId and renders a greeting when an agentId is provided; if agentId is missing or empty the panel displays a clear error message.
core_goals: Show a friendly greeting that includes the configured agentId when the agentId is provided.
Provide an explicit, user-facing error when no agentId is supplied or when it is empty.
Allow developers to supply or modify window.ELIZA_CONFIG.agentId before the app initializes to control the displayed greeting.

features.name: AgentId Greeting Panel
features.description: Reads window.ELIZA_CONFIG.agentId on load and displays either 'Hello <agentId>' when present or 'Error: Agent ID not found' when missing/empty.
user_flows: Inject window.ELIZA_CONFIG.agentId before app init -> Navigate to / -> See greeting text Hello <agentId>
Do not inject window.ELIZA_CONFIG.agentId before app init -> Navigate to / -> See error text Error: Agent ID not found
Inject window.ELIZA_CONFIG.agentId as an empty string before app init -> Navigate to / -> See error text Error: Agent ID not found

routes.description: Minimal agent panel that reads window.ELIZA_CONFIG and renders a greeting or an error message.

features.name: AgentId Greeting Panel
features.description: Displays Hello <agentId> when window.ELIZA_CONFIG.agentId is provided; otherwise shows Error: Agent ID not found.
user_interactions: See greeting text Hello <agentId> when agentId is present
See error text Error: Agent ID not found when agentId is missing/empty

known_limitations.issue: ELIZA_CONFIG.apiBase is defined but not used by the UI.
known_limitations.impact: The panel does not currently make any API requests; apiBase has no effect.

known_limitations.issue: PanelComponent greeting has a typo ("Helllo") and differs from the main greeting ("Hello").
known_limitations.impact: Tests/assertions should target the main rendered view, not the exported panel component string.
